title: Ops lead reconciles failed order exports every morning
text: The ops lead spends 45 minutes every morning exporting failed orders, checking spreadsheet rows, and deciding which support replies are safe to send.

title: Failed exports require manual spreadsheet checklist
text: When exports fail, support waits for ops to copy rows into a spreadsheet checklist. Missed rows become delayed customer updates.

title: Finance copies invoice handoffs between three tools
text: The finance lead spends two hours each Friday copying invoice data between tools because edge cases break the handoff and create billing mistakes.

title: Support supervisors rebuild escalation summaries manually
text: Supervisors rebuild escalation summaries from chat logs, ticket comments, and account notes before weekly customer-risk meetings.

title: Implementation manager tracks onboarding blockers in side spreadsheet
text: The implementation manager keeps a side spreadsheet of onboarding blockers because the project tool does not show which customer tasks are actually stuck.

title: Vendor compliance evidence is collected by email thread
text: A compliance coordinator asks vendors for the same policy screenshots every quarter and tracks missing evidence in email threads.

title: Security reviews stall while teams chase vendor answers
text: Security review owners wait days for vendor answers, then paste the responses into a risk sheet for the approver.

title: Clinic admin screenshots payer portal status daily
text: A clinic admin screenshots payer portal statuses each morning because denial updates do not land in the practice system reliably.

title: Logistics coordinator watches carrier portals for exceptions
text: The logistics coordinator opens five carrier portals twice a day to catch shipment exceptions before account managers hear from customers.

title: Property manager checks utility portals before move-ins
text: Before move-ins, the property manager manually checks utility provider portals because activation failures are not visible in the leasing system.

title: We need better visibility, maybe dashboards
text: Our team needs better visibility into what is going on. A dashboard might help, but I am not sure where the data should come from.

title: Manager says handoffs feel messy
text: A manager said handoffs are messy and people are frustrated, but did not name the workflow, buyer, frequency, or cost.

title: This software is annoying
text: This software is annoying today. Everything is bad and I hate clicking around.

title: RevOps reconciles lead routing exceptions by hand
text: RevOps reviews lead routing exceptions every afternoon, fixes account ownership in a spreadsheet, and warns sales managers when records look risky.

title: HR coordinator chases missing onboarding documents
text: An HR coordinator checks email, file uploads, and payroll notes to find missing onboarding documents before a new hire start date.
